name: New York Passport Agency
description_short: New York Passport Agency is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.0/5 with 1,330 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
New York Passport Agency is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 1,330 Google reviews and a 4.0/5.0 rating, New York Passport Agency has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

New York Passport Agency specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. New York Passport Agency operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering New York Passport Agency should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
